ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract summarizing the dataset's content */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dataset author */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness score of the dataset */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code indicating any issues with the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., clinical trial, laboratory, public database) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., genomic, imaging, clinical) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XLSX) */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Accessibility level (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is shared */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the dataset */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_contact_email FOREIGN KEY ("contact_email") REFERENCES datasets_authors ("email")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the keyword belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_keywords" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser type and version) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission applies */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset for which the permission is granted */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can edit the dataset */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can view the dataset */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can share the dataset */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can delete the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* The notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset that this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
